category_sources: Official ne homepage and repository describe ne as the nice editor for UNIX/POSIX systems.
source_facts.description says Text editor based on the POSIX standard.
display_name_sources: Official repository title uses ne, the nice editor.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides current project documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official ne site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/vigna/ne, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official repository describes ne as a text editor for UNIX-like systems.
source_facts.description identifies a POSIX text editor.
